$ bun run --cwd ../.. packages/ui/src/components/pages/__e2e__/run-suggestions-e2e.mjs

✓ s1: wallet switch produced a governed proactive-message frame
✓ s1: the admitted comment was persisted to the conversation

✓ s2: burst switch was rate-limited (no second frame)
✓ s2: gate recorded the suppression reason (global cooldown)
✓ s3: slash command stayed policy-silent (no judge call, no frame)
✓ s4: control shortcut (focus-composer) never reached the judge

✓ s5: agent-initiated switch produced no proactive comment
✓ s6: intent-bearing shortcut reached the judge

    t+  1.6s ADMIT    [wallet] ok
    t+  3.2s SUPPRESS [calendar] global cooldown

    t+261.6s SUPPRESS [wallet] per-surface cooldown
    t+761.6s SUPPRESS [shortcut:open-command-palette] duplicate of a recent comment
— phase 2: captured frames → real ChatTranscript in Chromium —
✓ frame 1 (real capture) parsed and appended
✓ one suggestion bubble rendered
✓ the bubble shows the governed comment text
✓ the bubble carries the "Suggestion" chip (not a normal reply)
✓ the bubble exposes the "Do it" and dismiss affordances
  📸 sg-01-suggestion-rendered.png
✓ malformed frame is rejected by the real parser (unparseable frame)
✓ a frame for an inactive conversation goes to unread, not the transcript
✓ second governed frame renders a second bubble
  📸 sg-02-two-suggestions.png
✓ replaying an already-delivered frame does not duplicate the bubble
✓ dismiss removes the suggestion bubble
✓ dismiss sends nothing to the agent
  📸 sg-03-after-dismiss.png
✓ "Do it" clears the suggestion bubble
✓ "Do it" sends the acceptance as a normal chat turn
  📸 sg-04-after-accept.png
  🎥 walkthrough.webm
✓ no uncaught page errors (0)

✅ proactive suggestions e2e passed
